textByHash.000f9a4dff24236e2f3c0ab996fe94a48b8776c6: Hmm, well I guess I should go check it out. No point staying in this nice, locked room when I could go outside into the creepy darkness.
textByHash.0363a34f72bbd5f263b5c0e8ecfef0c56ca68237: Oh well, back to the dishes.
textByHash.1a3d23d4fb99f6aeb6889e93a640d81b32b26518: I found some stuff in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. You need 2 more spaces in your inventory to take it all.
textByHash.1c50ca0523016a452a8697d54242df4b09952fea: I found some stuff in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. You need another space in your inventory to take it all.
textByHash.4365cd5dce27e3fc43972de0c5c4bf967a54ab28: Thanks again for your help. Stay safe.
textByHash.6188241a1fe9ce6fd47a85fc291ce73f8a9533a8: I will wait outside the house after seeing to this stab wound. You should come talk to me there.
textByHash.626330e01a2211b31f3fdb041d0b42cd13fbb969: Here, I found these in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. I don't want them so please, take them...
textByHash.6e7da9f8b36505c8e6d9cda6f132c447c4fef7b9: Dextrocardia. It means that my heart is on the right side of my chest, not the left like most people.
textByHash.83614bc418c055fb196c66c3906a8520299d149c: I found some stuff in the wardrobe when I was seeing to my wound. You need 3 more spaces in your inventory to take it all.
textByHash.9881d9947261fdbbe956107a79339acc3f1c179f: Oh, and I don't think there is any need to take this big, shiny weapon with me in order to defend myself. Nothing bad ever happens when people go check out noises in the dark outside of houses!
textByHash.b0f9d577c54e03080d9cda052e36fad3d064ca58: I did get stabbed, but I was born with a rare condition called Dextrocardia.
textByHash.ce2a20c58f60136c8f09a550699abb02843edac0: Much better thanks, and lucky to be alive, thanks to you in no small part.
textByHash.d94749ffc6c85ed784462caa0476b5c0ac8a5888: I did still get stabbed though, and am actually feeling pretty woozy...
textByHash.dfcbfcc746c2c3e23385fba8db36515498cc2d02: Why am I the one who is always left clearing up after everyone?
textByHash.fb7a40ea18c9518de13e926435cda28888749dce: See, I knew nothing would happen! Must have just been a squirrel or something running about.
